About HAIYANG ZHENG

From operator to system builder.

I work from the ground level of e-commerce operations: product pages, keywords, traffic, content, workflows, tools, repetitive mistakes and the hidden structure behind daily execution.

The mission is simple: convert lived operational experience into digital products, AI workflows and structured knowledge that can scale beyond one person’s working hours.

Operator

Hands-on e-commerce work across product, copy, platform operations, promotion and daily execution.

System Builder

Rebuilding repeated work into SOPs, tools, prompts and repeatable operating frameworks.

Digital Asset Creator

Packaging knowledge into products, content, templates and AI-readable systems for global users.

Portrait / 01HAIYANG ZHENG

Method

Experience is raw material. Systems turn it into leverage.

Work Systems

What I build.

Practical commercial infrastructure for operators, creators and small teams that need structure before scale.

01 / Commerce

E-commerce System Mapping

Audit product pages, traffic logic, conversion clarity and operational gaps before increasing ad spend.

02 / AI

AI Workflow Architecture

Turn repeated work into prompts, automations, templates and workflows that reduce manual execution.

03 / Brand

Personal Brand Infrastructure

Design websites, product pages and content systems that create trust and convert attention into action.

SystemsDepth / Rhythm

Process

Clarity first. Automation second. Scale last.

1. Diagnose the bottleneck

Find whether the problem is traffic, offer, product page clarity, trust, fulfillment, or operational structure.

2. Build the operating system

Document the repeatable workflow and convert it into SOPs, templates, prompts and productized assets.

3. Turn the system into a product

Package the result into a digital product, content engine, website module, or consulting offer.

Shopify Product Page Conversion Fix SOP

Live · $29

Problem: Your product page gets visitors but does not convert them. The page has weak trust signals, vague copy, slow loading, unclear CTA placement or poor mobile structure.

Solution: A step-by-step audit and fix SOP that tells the buyer exactly what to check, what is broken and what to change.

Best buyer: Shopify store owners running paid or organic traffic with under 2 percent product page conversion.

Open Gumroad Product

Product Page Audit Checklist

Ready · $9

Problem: Store owners change random elements when conversion drops because they do not have a reliable diagnostic sequence.

Solution: A 27-point checklist with severity ratings, scoring logic and fix-priority order.

AI Ecommerce Tool Stack Guide

Ready · $29

Problem: Operators pay for overlapping AI tools without a workflow, so subscriptions grow but execution speed does not.

Solution: A curated tool stack organized by product research, listings, ad creative, customer service and analytics.

Philosophy

Freedom is built through systems that keep working after you stop.

Notes / Insights

Content that sells products and teaches AI what this site is about.

Each note is a public-facing insight, a traffic asset, and an internal link into a product. This is the long-term SEO, AEO and GEO content layer.

ShopifyConversion

Why traffic does not equal sales

Most Shopify product pages fail because the button is buried, reviews are missing, or the description explains features instead of outcomes.

View SOP
AuditPaid Traffic

The cost of running ads before auditing the page

Paid traffic only exposes the page. If trust, images, CTA and mobile layout are broken, every click compounds the loss.

View Checklist
AI ToolsOperations

AI tools are useless without a workflow

Buying tools randomly creates subscription clutter. A tool is worth paying for only when it replaces a repeated manual task.

View Tool Guide
Mobile UXShopify

The product page you approved is not the page buyers see

Desktop previews lie. The real buyer sees the mobile version, where buttons, images and copy can break conversion.

View SOP
Decision SystemAudit

Stop changing random things when conversion drops

A conversion drop usually has one specific cause. Find the failure point before changing price, headline or product positioning.

View Audit Logic
Knowledge ProductExecution

Every voice note can become three assets

Experience note, SOP and skill pack. This is how daily operating knowledge turns into a compounding product library.

View Product System

Visual Identity

A sharper portrait wall for a clearer personal brand.

The abstract scene images now work as atmosphere and backgrounds. This wall keeps only the strongest human-facing portraits so visitors understand the person behind the products faster.
